title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese reverse-engineers how Boris Cherny, Claude Code's creator, automates work using Claude Skills. The analysis identifies three key strategies: agents for task automation, hooks for triggering workflows, and loops with scheduling for recurring operations. Marchese highlights two underutilized powerful features and emphasizes quality-over-quantity principles in skill adoption.
